breakfast.serpme_desc: Assorted cheeses, honey-clotted cream, olives, and hot appetizers.
breakfast.omlet_desc: Made with fresh farm eggs and butter.
breakfast.menemen_desc: Traditional Turkish scrambled eggs with tomatoes and peppers.

snacks.burger_desc: 180g beef patty, caramelized onions and crispy fries.
snacks.manti_desc: Hand-rolled Turkish dumplings with yogurt and burnt butter.
snacks.taco_desc: Slow-cooked beef rib, cilantro, lime and pico de gallo.
snacks.mini_burger_desc: House-made sauces and melted cheddar cheese sliders.

salads.greek_desc: Tomatoes, cucumbers, feta cheese, olives, and red onions.
salads.coban_desc: Finely chopped garden vegetables with lemon dressing.
salads.special_desc: Seasonal greens, walnuts, pomegranate, and chef's vinaigrette.

main.bolonez_desc: Traditional Italian meat sauce with aged parmesan.
main.kofte_desc: Grilled spiced meatballs with rice and roasted peppers.
main.arrabiata_desc: Spicy tomato sauce with garlic and fresh parsley.
main.pesto_desc: Fresh basil, pine nuts, and parmesan blended with olive oil.
main.chef_burger_desc: 180g juicy beef patty with our chef's secret sauce.
main.fries_desc: Crispy golden fries served with truffle mayo.

alcohol.jd_desc: Tennessee whiskey with caramel and oak notes.
alcohol.raki_std_desc: Pure anise flavor with a smooth finish.
alcohol.jameson_desc: Triple distilled, smooth and balanced Irish whiskey.

ui.service_note: VAT is included in our prices.
